channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Mg supplementing
item.description: Source: TW Thread by @mindmusclepro 𝗠𝗮𝗴𝗻𝗲𝘀𝗶𝘂𝗺 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗱 Magnesium is a nutrient that is essential for so many functions in the human body. Magnesium is required to make hundreds of enzymes work and assists with thousands of others. The most important of these is the enzyme reaction tht involves the creation of energy by activating adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the fundamental energy storage molecule of the body. No Magnesium = No energy. Magnesium along with some other nutrients r essential to create structural components of the body
